name: job-search-lab2
description: ЛР2: микросервисная архитектура Job Search Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gw,auth,co,sk,res,vac,app,fav,nt -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red,gray,magenta "npm run dev --prefix gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth" "npm run dev --prefix services/company" "npm run dev --prefix services/skills" "npm run dev --prefix services/resume" "npm run dev --prefix services/vacancy" "npm run dev --prefix services/application" "npm run dev --prefix services/favorites" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification"
